title: Like Rain

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Let justice reign like morning light
From mountain peaks to valleys low
Your wisdom guide the ruler's heart
Let peace like rivers ever flow

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The weak and poor find shelter here
Their voices rise above the storm
The oppressed will find their strength renewed
The broken spirit will transform

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let Your reign shower down like rain
On fields awaiting morning sun
From sea to sea, Your justice flows
Till moon and stars their course have run
(Till moon and stars their course have run)

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: The desert blooms with heaven's grace
The mountains burst with righteousness
Each nation bows in humble praise
As mercy flows in endlessness

sections.label: Bridge
lines: From distant shores they bring their gifts
Gold offerings and grateful hearts
Your kingdom stands through endless days
Your love remains when kingdoms part

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Let Your reign shower down like rain
On fields awaiting morning sun
From sea to sea, Your justice flows
Till moon and stars their course have run
Your name endures beyond all time
Your glory fills the rising sun
From age to age Your mercy flows
Till moon and stars their course have run

epigraph: He shall come down like rain upon the mown grass
